home.heroSubheadline: Raised with love and care from the very first days
home.trustHealthDesc: Parents tested for PRA, PK Deficiency and breed-specific conditions
home.trustHomeDesc: Kittens grow up in a family environment
home.kittensEmpty: No kittens available at the moment
home.kittensWaitlist: Join our waitlist to be notified when new kittens arrive.
home.aboutParagraph1: Floriente Cattery was born from a deep love for Oriental and Siamese cats. Our founder Elvira has dedicated years to understanding these extraordinary breeds - their elegance, intelligence, and remarkable bond with humans.
home.aboutParagraph2: And then there's Oleksandr - Elvira's husband and the other half of Floriente. He's the one who handles feed runs, vet trips, heavy lifting, and delivers kittens to their new families. He rarely makes it into the frame, but everything you don't see rests on him.
home.aboutParagraph3: We are a small, home-based cattery where every cat is a family member. Our kittens grow up surrounded by love, daily interaction, and the warmth of a real home.
home.familySubtitle: Our kittens in their new homes
home.testimonialsSubtitle: More testimonials coming soon - we're collecting stories from our families
home.familyCtaText: We'll help you find the kitten that fits your home best.

about.storyText: Floriente Cattery was born from a deep love for Oriental and Siamese cats. Our founder Elvira has dedicated years to understanding these extraordinary breeds - their elegance, intelligence, and remarkable bond with humans.
about.storyText2: We are a small, home-based cattery where every cat is a family member. Our kittens grow up surrounded by love, daily interaction, and the comfort of a real home.
about.philosophyHealthDesc: Every breeding cat tested for PRA, PK Deficiency and breed-specific conditions. Test results available on request.
about.philosophyHomeDesc: Our cats live among us. Kittens are socialized from birth with people, sounds, and everyday life.
about.philosophyQualityDesc: We have only a few litters per year. Each kitten receives individual attention and care. We know each kitten's character by the time they leave.
about.philosophySupportDesc: We stay connected with every family. Our support doesn't end when the kitten leaves - it's just the beginning.
about.certsSubtitle: WCF documents, champion titles, and breeder education
about.homeSubtitle: Our cats share our home and our life
about.healthText: Responsible breeding starts with health. All our breeding cats undergo genetic testing before being bred.
about.healthTests: Our cats are tested for PRA, PK Deficiency, and other breed-specific conditions. Test results are available upon request.

blog.heroText: Articles about Oriental and Siamese cats - health, care, and life at Floriente.
blog.emptyText: First articles are in the works. Come back soon - we'll write about breed care, health, and our cats.

howToVerify.title: How to Verify a Legitimate Cattery: A Buyer's Checklist
howToVerify.description: Don't fall for cat scams. Use this expert checklist to verify any cattery before sending money. Real credentials, real red flags, real protection.
howToVerify.ctaText: We pass every point on this checklist. See for yourself.

contact.heroText: Write to us through any channel that suits you - WhatsApp, Instagram, or email. Questions about our kittens, the breed, or anything else - we answer everything.
contact.methodsSubtitle: Reach out through any of these channels - we typically reply within a few hours
contact.followSubtitle: Stay updated with our daily life, new litters, and behind-the-scenes moments
contact.whatsappDesc: Our primary channel. Write anytime - we usually reply within a few hours.
contact.emailDesc: For formal inquiries, contracts, or documents.
contact.instagramDesc: Follow our daily life, new litters, and behind-the-scenes moments.
contact.tiktokDesc: Follow us for daily moments with our cats and kittens.
contact.instagramDmDesc: Send us a direct message on Instagram for a quick chat.
contact.mapTitle: Floriente Cattery location - Kyiv Region, Ukraine
contact.locationNote: Kitten delivery available across Europe. Exact location shared after reservation.
contact.hoursText: We typically respond within 2–4 hours during daytime (EET/EEST). Evenings and weekends may take a bit longer.

howToBuy.heroTitle: Your Journey to a Floriente Kitten
howToBuy.heroText: Finding the right kitten takes time. Here's how we work with every family - from the first message to the day your kitten comes home.
howToBuy.processSubtitle: From first message to handover - seven steps
howToBuy.step1Desc: Write to us on WhatsApp or Instagram. Tell us about yourself, your family, and what you're looking for in a companion.
howToBuy.step2Desc: We'll arrange a short video call so we can meet each other, answer your questions, and show you our home and cats.
howToBuy.step3Desc: Once we have a litter available, we'll help you find the kitten whose personality and temperament are the best fit for your family.
howToBuy.step4Desc: Secure your kitten with a 50% deposit and a signed contract. From this moment, your kitten is reserved for you.
howToBuy.step5Desc: Receive regular photos and videos as your kitten grows. You'll see their first steps, first games, and developing personality.
howToBuy.step6Desc: At 3+ months your kitten is fully vaccinated, microchipped, and ready to come home. We arrange delivery across Europe.
howToBuy.step7Desc: Our relationship doesn't end at handover. We stay in touch for advice on adaptation, nutrition, behaviour - anytime you need us.
howToBuy.pricingSubtitle: Transparent pricing with no hidden costs
howToBuy.petDesc: For loving families. Includes spay/neuter contract.
howToBuy.breedShowDesc: For approved breeding programmes or show careers. Pricing discussed individually based on the kitten.
howToBuy.depositNote: Non-refundable if the buyer cancels. May be refunded under the terms specified in the contract.
howToBuy.tcoSubtitle: A responsible breeder saves you thousands in the long run
howToBuy.tcoVaccinesYes: Full vaccination against viruses and rabies
howToBuy.includedSubtitle: Every kitten leaves with everything they need to start their new life
howToBuy.included1: Full vaccination against viruses and rabies
howToBuy.responsibilitiesSubtitle: We trust our families - and ask for a few promises in return
howToBuy.resp2: Follow the breeder's care and nutrition guidelines
howToBuy.resp3: Do not rehome without the breeder's consent
howToBuy.resp4: Share updates - we love seeing our kittens thrive
howToBuy.supportText: Elvira stays in contact with every family. Questions about adaptation, nutrition, or behaviour - write anytime. Many of our families stay in touch years after, sending photos and asking for advice.
howToBuy.supportQuote: We raise cats with character. The kind of character that makes a family say 'this one chose us' years later.
howToBuy.ctaText: Start with a message. We'll tell you which litters are coming and find out if we're a fit for each other.

faq.heroText: Everything you need to know about Oriental and Siamese kittens at Floriente Cattery.
faq.ctaText: Didn't find your answer? We'd love to hear from you.
